activities.title: Construct the Square Root Spiral
activities.details: Students will construct a square root spiral to visualize irrational numbers.

activities.title: Visualise Algebraic Identities using Geometrical Models
activities.details: Students will use geometric models and algebra tiles to visualise identities, factorisation of quadratic expressions, and simplification of rational expressions.

activities.title: Tower of Hanoi Puzzle
activities.details: Students will solve the Tower of Hanoi puzzle to understand recursive rules in sequences.

activities.title: Represent a Floor Plan on a Grid using Coordinates
activities.details: Students will specify locations and positions of points relative to each other using coordinates.

activities.title: Constructing a Square with a Given Side (Sulbasutras)
activities.details: Students will describe the construction of a square as given in Baudhayana's Sulbasutras.

activities.title: Drawing, Measurement, and Paper Manipulation Activities for 4-gons
activities.details: Students will engage in drawing, measurement, and paper manipulation to discover geometric patterns involving triangles and quadrilaterals.

activities.title: Geometric Constructions using Axioms
activities.details: Students will construct bisectors of line segments, angles, triangles, and other polygons satisfying given constraints.

activities.title: Squaring a Rectangle (Baudhayana's Sulbasutras)
activities.details: Students will explore the classical problem of 'squaring' a given shape using methods from ancient civilisations.

activities.title: Empirical Probability Experiments
activities.details: Students will perform experiments to estimate the empirical probability of events.

projects.title: Mathematics Laboratory Activities (Prescribed Books)
projects.details: Lab activities to be done from the prescribed books: 'Guidelines for Mathematics Laboratory in Schools, class IX' and 'Laboratory Manual - Mathematics, secondary stage'. Includes graphing data, constructing geometric shapes, and measuring 3D objects.

practicals.title: Lab Practical Assessment
practicals.details: Assessment component worth 5 marks involving lab activities from prescribed books, focusing on graphical representation of data, geometric constructions (bisectors, triangles), and calculation of surface areas/volumes.
